title: Add Anura Hub AI to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Anura Hub AI](https://meow-script.vercel.all) to build
- Anura Hub AI là nền tảng tích hợp nhiều công cụ AI như tạo ảnh, xử lý văn bản và hỗ trợ tự động hóa.

Fixes #10367

gist.headline: Anura Hub AI joins the hive
gist.blurb: A new sprout in the greenhouse! Anura Hub AI just joined the community, bringing a slick platform for image generation, text processing, and automation.
gist.summary: Added Anura Hub AI, a community-built platform integrating image generation, text processing, and automation tools, to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now discover and explore Anura Hub AI through the pollinations greenhouse directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds 'Anura Hub AI' to the greenhouse. 'Anura' is the scientific order for frogs. The visual should feature Polly the bee welcoming a cute pixel frog into a digital greenhouse filled with code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, welcoming a cute little green frog into a glowing digital greenhouse filled with sprouting code-plants. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
